Incidents

Count: 1 minor incident
Duration: 12 minutes
Status: Resolved

Summary: On March 6 at 14:18 UTC, the Notification Service experienced elevated queue latency following a configuration change during routine deployment activity.

Impact: A subset of outbound email and SMS notifications were delayed by up to 9 minutes. No messages were lost, and core application functionality remained available.

Resolution: Engineers reverted the queue worker concurrency setting, drained the backlog, and validated normal delivery rates. Full service was restored by 14:30 UTC.
